sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing. He denies chest pain, dyspnea, or syncope.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The doctor observed high blood pressure. The echocardiogram shows left ventricular hypertrophy. The echocardiogram pumping function is stable. The ECG is stable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has left ventricular hypertrophy. The patient is experiencing orthostatic dizziness.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a repeat echocardiogram to assess the pumping function. Recommend increased oral hydration and slow positional changes. Follow up if symptoms worsen or do not improve.
